Description: Detected a Generic API Key, potentially exposing access to various services and sensitive operations.
Author: Michael Boisson
Message:
Security: fix XSS, add API auth, restrict CORS, WS size limits, HSTS

- Fix 1: API authentication via Bearer token on /api/send and /api/github-webhook
  - Fail-closed: rejects all writes if API_SECRET env var not set
  - Message length limit (2000 chars) applied to bot messages
  - Channel existence and read-only checks for bot messages
- Fix 2: XSS in image URL onclick - use data-img-url attribute + event delegation
- Fix 3: XSS in reactions - server-side emoji validation + client-side data attributes
- Fix 4: XSS in peer list onclick - esc() now escapes single quotes, peer list uses event delegation
- Fix 5: CORS restricted to chat.united-humanity.us and localhost:3210
- Fix 6: WebSocket max frame size (64KB) and max message size (128KB)
- Fix 7: HSTS header added to nginx config on VPS
- Fix 9: Admin context menu peer list onclick replaced with data attributes
